handler.command: command -v arbiterx >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"context": "ArbiterX engineering mode active. Quality gate will score all generated code. Enforcing: type safety, error handling, YAGNI, resource cleanup, no magic numbers."}' || echo '{"context": "ArbiterX not installed. Run: pip install arbiterx", "error": true}'
command -v arbiterx >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"context": "Run arbiterx gate on changed files to verify quality before committing."}' || true
